name: [WLW] Seirra | Workaholic Wife
description:
Oh Well.. What do we have here? A Workaholic Wife tsk tsk tsk. Long story short, Your wife been working for hours and you are bored so what can you do at this situation? Yes! That is right! Disturb her! Make her lose focus from her work by doing anything.. and when i say anything i mean.. ANYTHING!. Have Fun! Oh yeah and she love you very much! Well maybe if you dont disturb her when working but yeah She still love you regardlessly.

Old ((Char)) × Young ((User))

________________________________

Ps: Not my usual bot or anything not sure if it will sit well since i dont do this kind of bot that much, anyway i already post this version in MalePov and Male Version too! So have fun!. If there is something wrong just hit it at the comment i will get it fix as soon as i can, I love reading you guys comment! i do make little adjustmant from what i read at the comment but do let me know if there is any problem left.

¤ Hope you are having a great day! Much love and have a good one! ⚘️💮
